◢ About VJS Smart Systems

A technology-driven engineering company.

VJS Smart Systems is a technology-driven engineering company specializing in Industrial Automation, Control Panels, IoT Solutions, Robotics, Mechatronics, and Remote Monitoring Systems. We help industries improve operational efficiency, reduce downtime, optimize energy consumption, and gain real-time visibility into critical processes through innovative automation technologies.

Headquartered

Hyderabad, IN

Specialization

Industry 4.0

◢ Our Services

Full-stack engineering, from PLC to cloud.

Seven core service lines covering the entire automation lifecycle — designed for resilience, scalability and long-term partnership.

Industrial Automation

PLC programming, machine automation, process control, and smart manufacturing solutions.

SCADA & HMI Development

Real-time monitoring, visualization, alarm management, and reporting systems.

Industrial IoT Solutions

Cloud-connected monitoring systems with real-time dashboards and analytics.

Wireless Monitoring Systems

LoRa-based remote monitoring and control solutions for distributed assets.

Control Panel Manufacturing

Customized industrial control panels designed for various applications.

Robotics & Mechatronics

Advanced automation solutions integrating sensors, actuators, and robotics.

Industry 4.0 Integration

Digital transformation, predictive maintenance, and intelligent manufacturing systems.

Need a custom solution?

Talk to engineering

Engineered hardware. Smart software. Field-proven.

LoRa Monitoring & Control Panel

Long-range, low-power wireless control for distributed industrial assets.

Chemical Liquid Level Monitoring & Control System

Chemical-grade level monitoring with closed-loop control.

Chemical Liquid Level Indicator

IoT Gateway
